title: feat: add dedicated agent session page
summary: Adds a dedicated minimal agent session page at /agents/:agentId/session with a stripped-down layout (no sidebar, no info pane, no model picker). Includes a MinimalRootLayout, session header with optional request-context preset dropdown, a new hideModelSwitcher prop threaded through AgentChat/Thread/Composer, a 'Share' button on the agent entity header to copy the session URL, E2E tests, changeset, and docs update.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured PR from a maintainer with excellent quality signals: thorough description, E2E tests, changeset, and docs. All CI checks pass. However, there are merge conflicts that need to be resolved before merging. CodeRabbit review flagged minor issues: duplicated RootLayout/MinimalRootLayout wiring in App.tsx, unreachable 'Agent not found' branch in session.tsx, and suggestion to move hideModelSwitcher to shared ChatProps type. No human reviews yet.
